title: Statements should be on separate lines
description: Statements should be on separate linesAnalyze your codeconsistency-formattedmaintainabilityCode SmellWhy is this an issue?Putting multiple statements on a single line lowers the code readability and makes debugging the code more complex.foo(); bar(); // NoncompliantWrite one statement per line to improve readability.foo(); bar();Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since9.1Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. checks.message: Put each statement on a separate line for better readability
